title: SQL: thetajoin limitation
poc: create table s1 (id int, v char(10));
create table s2 (id int, v char(10));
select s1.id from s1, s2 where s1.v between s2.v and s2.v||'c' ;
key_bug_features: SQL query using BETWEEN with concatenated string
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE s1 (id int, v char(10) NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE s2 (id int, v char(10) NOT NULL UNIQUE);
SELECT s1.id FROM s1 JOIN s2 ON s1.v BETWEEN s2.v AND s2.v || 'c';
